Package com.wip.controller

Class HomeController

java.lang.Object
com.wip.controller.HomeController
@Controller public class HomeController extends Object
Spring MVC controller that handles the home page, root redirect, and dashboard views.

This controller is responsible for the top-level navigation of the Courier Tracking System's web UI. It serves the public-facing landing page at / and /home, and provides a role-aware dashboard at /dashboard. When an authenticated user visits the root URL they are automatically redirected to the dashboard. The dashboard populates the Thymeleaf model with high-level statistics: administrators see totals for customers, parcels, and shipments, while regular users see totals for parcels and their active shipments.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Constructor Details

    • HomeController

      public HomeController(CustomerService customerService, ParcelService parcelService, ShipmentService shipmentService)
      Constructs a HomeController with the required service dependencies.

      Spring automatically injects these services via constructor injection, ensuring that all dependencies are non-null at runtime.

      Parameters:
      customerService - service for customer-related data retrieval
      parcelService - service for parcel-related data retrieval
      shipmentService - service for shipment-related data retrieval

  • Method Details

    • index

      @GetMapping("/") public String index()
      Handles GET requests to the root URL (/).

      If the requesting user is fully authenticated (i.e., not the anonymous principal), they are redirected to the dashboard. Unauthenticated visitors are served the public home page (home view).

      Returns:
      "redirect:/dashboard" for authenticated users, or "home" for unauthenticated visitors

    • home

      @GetMapping("/home") public String home()
      Handles GET requests to /home.

      Renders the public-facing landing page of the application. This endpoint is accessible to both authenticated and unauthenticated users and does not add any model attributes.

      Returns:
      the logical view name "home"

    • dashboard

      @GetMapping("/dashboard") public String dashboard(org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Handles GET requests to /dashboard and populates the model with summary statistics.

      The data added to the model is role-dependent:

      • Admin users receive totalCustomers, totalParcels, and totalShipments counts for the global system overview.
      • Regular users receive totalParcels and activeShipments counts relevant to their context.

      The rendered view is the index Thymeleaf template.

      Parameters:
      model - the Spring MVC Model used to pass statistics to the view
      Returns:
      the logical view name "index"
